meta.notes: INFRASTRUCTURE ISSUES: MiniMax proxy (7i30hpv4bo9ud5mhianq.pika.art) down for BGM — attempt 1 returned 10.3s clip (too short, rejected), attempts 2+3 failed with RemoteDisconnected/ProxyError (~200s wasted total). BGM reused from prior run (65.5s track). LLM phase short (~17s) because concept+script+prompts written inline without separate tool calls — a fully cold session with step-by-step LLM calls would add ~180-300s. SeeDance ran cleanly on first attempt (no timeouts, both acts succeeded). Wall start: 2026-04-23T06:38:02Z, Wall end: 2026-04-23T06:48:30Z.

test_input.name: freitag-sky-blue-backpack-brief
test_input.description: Freitag sky-blue tarp cube backpack TVC from brand brief. Concept: 'The City Gave It Back'. 2 local images (bag.webp + logo.png), no character ref image. Run2 — fresh SeeDance generations, same brief as run1.

task.name: short-ads
task.purpose: Generate 30s brand TVC for FREITAG from brand brief: 2×15s SeeDance acts, MiniMax BGM, ElevenLabs VO, ffmpeg encode
task.expected_output: Landscape 16:9 MP4 (30s) with SeeDance-generated video (2 acts), ambient electronic BGM, deep English VO slogan, crop+eq colour grade

install.notes: No install step — skill pre-installed at ~/nova3-agent-skills/short-ads/

asset_acquisition.notes: Assets local on Desktop (Logo_Freitag.png, 000003899622_1-20240923161710.webp). No download needed.

steps.name: llm_concept_script_prompts
steps.notes: LLM phase: concept, brand tone profile, 8-shot visual script, 2x Seedance prompt pairs (EN). Written inline in same session — no separate tool calls. A fresh cold session with step-by-step LLM calls estimated at 180-300s.

steps.name: seedance_act1
steps.notes: SeeDance 2.0 r2v Act 1. 1 image ref (bag). 28 IN_PROGRESS polls before COMPLETED. seed=1729442179. Output: 4.3MB. No timeout — clean run.

steps.name: seedance_act2
steps.notes: SeeDance 2.0 r2v Act 2. 2 image refs (bag + logo). 19 IN_PROGRESS polls before COMPLETED. seed=41007897. Output: 4.1MB. No timeout — clean run.

steps.name: seedance_wall
steps.notes: Acts ran in parallel. Wall time = max(act1=267s, act2=190s). Measured: 266,605ms.

steps.name: ffmpeg_concat
steps.notes: ffmpeg -f concat joining act1+act2 into 30.08s video_noaudio.mp4. Measured: 6,670ms.

steps.name: bgm_minimax
steps.notes: REUSED from prior run (65.5s track). MiniMax proxy failed all 3 attempts: attempt 1 returned 10.3s clip (rejected as too short), attempts 2+3 RemoteDisconnected/ProxyError. 200s wasted. Typical clean-run duration: 30-60s.

steps.name: vo_elevenlabs
steps.notes: ElevenLabs eleven_v3, Brian voice (nPczCjzI2devNBz1zQrb). Text: 'The city gave it back.' Measured: 2,630ms. Output: 26KB.

steps.name: ffmpeg_encode
steps.notes: Final encode: crop=1200:675:40:22, scale=1280:720, eq brightness+contrast, BGM 0.45vol, VO 3.0vol at 27283ms. crf=16 preset=slow. Measured: 12,179ms. Output: 11MB.

execution.notes: execution.total_s = wall_total (628s). skill_run_s = successful step durations (17+267+7+0+3+12=306). BGM failures (~200s) treated as tool_calls overhead in totals. llm_overhead_s = 628-506=122s (506 = 306 successful + 200 BGM failures).

delivery.notes: Local delivery only. No CDN upload.

tokens._note: Extracted via extract-cc-tokens.py --after 2026-04-23T06:38:02Z --before 2026-04-23T06:48:30Z. 16 messages matched, 820 filtered out. effective_input_tokens=1726680. Lower than run1 because this is a separate session window mid-session.

totals._note: tool_calls_s = successful steps (306) + BGM failed attempts (200) = 506. llm_overhead_s = 628-506=122. SeeDance ran cleanly this run (no fal.ai timeouts). BGM proxy still down — same infrastructure failure as run1. Estimated clean-infrastructure wall (fresh BGM, inline LLM): ~420s. True cold-start LLM would add ~180-300s → clean cold wall ~560-600s.
